failures.description: The agent misunderstood or violated the user's availability constraint by planning to search all vacuum cleaners instead of only available vacuum cleaners.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner, so availability is a key constraint. At index 1, the Coordinator sets plan_query.available_only to false and explicitly says it will search regardless of current availability. This optimizes for a different constraint than the user requested. The required information was present in the user request, and there was no tool error or missing information.
